title: Replace temporary_assigns+append with streams and preserve dom_id
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/log_tail_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.LogTailLive). The pre-stream idiom in Phoenix 1.6 used `temporary_assigns: [log_entries: []]` with `phx-update="append"` and each entry had a stable DOM id. Replace with stream/3: mount/3 calls stream(:log_entries, []) with no temporary_assigns. Use phx-update="stream" on a container with id="log-tail". Each entry renders inside :for={{dom_id, entry} <- @streams.log_entries} with id={dom_id}. handle_info({:log, entry}, socket) stream_inserts at position -1. The dom_id semantics must be preserved.
tier_rationale: Multi-idiom migration. Requires knowing both the old and new patterns.
